summary: Iter 240 - tested batch fixes: purchases report (purchases_new), supplier-payment-dues, super-admin security log, dashboard supplier-dues banner, Reports page hidden المشتريات tab, and Super-Admin السجل الأمني tab. All backend endpoints and frontend flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard renders a cashier-register selection modal on first login that overlays the page — banner interactions still functional but Playwright element-level force-click sometimes fails silently because the overlay swallows pointer events. Consider auto-dismissing the cashier-modal when an admin lands on the dashboard with no open shift, or set proper pointer-events on backdrop.
Banner data-testids 'supplier-dues-toggle-btn'/'supplier-dues-dismiss-btn' need to be reachable with native pointer click; verified JS .click() works (React handlers fine).
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded purchases_new (p1/p2/p3) and suppliers sup-a/sup-b. Did not modify or delete seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file lives at /app/backend/tests/test_iter240_dues_and_security.py and supports `dues` key (current response shape) plus legacy `items` fallback. Super-admin login endpoint is /api/super-admin/login (or /api/auth/login works too). Security log tab is the 5th TabsTrigger (data-testid=security-log-tab) inside 'إدارة العملاء' card; clicking it lazy-fetches /api/super-admin/security-log. Cashier-register selection modal appears for admin on dashboard on first login and may intercept Playwright clicks — use JS .click() via page.evaluate() to fire React handlers reliably.
verified_endpoints: GET /api/reports/purchases -> total_purchases=1000000, total_transactions=3, total_unpaid=700000, by_payment_status.pending=700000, by_supplier {مورد تجريبي أ:700000, مورد تجريبي ب:300000}
GET /api/supplier-payment-dues -> {dues:[p1,p2], total_count:2, overdue_count:1, total_remaining:700000} with due_date, estimated(bool), days_overdue, is_overdue, no paid leaks
GET /api/super-admin/security-log -> {events:[], summary:{total:2,active:1,disabled:1,expiring_soon:0,expired:1}, expiring_soon:[], expired:[Test Helper Tenant]} + 403 for admin role
verified_ui_flows: Dashboard: <SupplierDuesBanner/> sticky banner visible after admin login (overdue red gradient)
Banner dismiss btn -> hides banner, shows floating supplier-dues-revive-btn bell with count badge

/reports tabs list contains: التقرير الشامل, المبيعات, المصاريف, الأرباح, الأصناف, التوصيل, إغلاق الصندوق, الإلغاءات, الخصومات, المرتجعات, الآجل, البطاقة, التقرير الذكي. 'المشتريات' TabsTrigger correctly REMOVED.

Super-admin /super-admin login (owner@maestroegp.com / owner123 / 271018) works; 'إدارة العملاء' card contains 5 tabs including 'السجل الأمني' (data-testid=security-log-tab). Click reveals security-log-content with summary cards (إجمالي العملاء=2, نشط=1, معطّل=1, اشتراك ينتهي قريباً=0, اشتراك منتهٍ=1), تنبيهات الاشتراك section, events feed with security-event-0..N, and security-log-refresh button.
